teng.note: name changed harma→aha with the sound (App E)
App E: Westron application of Grade 3 gives 12 = ch
[I-H] App E gives grade-5 values only for 17 and 18 ('the most common signs for n and m'); the series III/IV nasal values are inference.
[I-H] App E gives grade-5 values only for 17 and 18 ('the most common signs for n and m'); the series III/IV nasal values are inference.
name ázë→essë with z>ss merger (App E)
App E: 'áre sunlight (or esse name), áre nuquerna' — the '(or esse)' attaches to 31, not 32.

teng.q: breath-h; before r,l = voiceless hr, hl
teng.note: 'simple raised stem without bow' (App E fn)
Not a carrier: 'The primary letters were each formed of a telco (stem) and a lúva (bow)'. The short carrier is unnamed in App E.
like undotted j [I] The long carrier is unnamed in App E; 'ára' appears nowhere in the corpus.
not in the App E primary table [I] No tengwa of this name appears in the corpus.

cirth.note: Erebor is 'a further modification of this system' (Angerthas Moria) and does not alter 34/35/54, so the Moria value stands. App E's list of NEW Dwarvish cirth is closed (37, 40, 41, 53, 55, 56); 54 is an altered value, so a Daeron value must exist.
halved form of 46; schwa of Westron/Dwarvish (App E)

note: Appendix E's tengwar and Angerthas value tables are printed as IMAGES in the edition held by this archive, so no text search can confirm them. Values below were checked against Appendix E's PROSE, which states the tengwar grade formulas but only about fifteen of the fifty-eight certh values. Anything resting on the plate alone is marked [I].
